claim: Audited Salt roots carry a 0.03556 m layer in thermal boundary thicknessLayers.
documentation_excerpt: Readable Salt CFD case boundary dictionaries contain a 0.03556 m layer, labeled as the 1.4 in wall/insulation layer. The 0.25 in and 0.30 in values in older friction/temperature sweeps are 1D diagnostic settings, not the CFD case label.

claim: rcExternalTemperature patches carry emissivity metadata, with no radiationProperties and no qr/G field in audited roots/latest retained time.
documentation_excerpt: rcExternalTemperature patches carry emissivity metadata, but audited case roots have no constant/radiationProperties and no qr or G field. Patchwise heat ledgers therefore set radiation_present=False and preserve emissivity as metadata only.
